articles.title: Homes harder to sell as high mortgage rates frustrate buyers
articles.summary: Three in five homes listed for sale since January remain on the market, says property portal Zoopla.

articles.title: We had packed lunches every day for 10 years and retired at 40
articles.summary: The Fire (Financially Independent, Retire Early) movement sees followers save as much as possible.

articles.title: Chinese tycoon sentenced to 30 years in US jail
articles.summary: Guo Wengui branded himself as a China critic, gaining followers who backed his fraudulent schemes.

articles.title: Hollywood director gets two and a half years in prison for defrauding Netflix
articles.summary: He was accused of using money for a Netflix show on lavish purchases like Rolls Royces and Ferraris.

articles.title: Medicare will start covering obesity drugs for the first time. Here's what patients should know
articles.summary: The move could unlock millions of new patients for Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly and expand access to medications that were previously out of reach for seniors.

articles.title: Comcast's NBCUniversal spinoff raises hope for more deals. There may not be good options
articles.summary: Comcast plans to separate its cable and media divisions over the next year. This could set each company up for M&A, but there might not be any good options.

articles.title: Eli Lilly, Regeneron among first companies selected for FDA initiative to speed review of new manufacturing facilities
articles.summary: Eli Lilly and Regeneron are among the first seven companies the FDA has selected for its PreCheck Pilot Program, CNBC has learned.

articles.title: Seniors in Medicare are about to get landmark obesity drug coverage — but many may not know it yet
articles.summary: Many seniors may be unaware of the landmark coverage shift starting on July 1, with limited advertising seen from the government or Eli Lilly and Novo.
